---
title: "Resume & Contact"
format: html
---

## Profile

Data and Society BA student at CEU working at the intersection of election data, public communication, and web product development. I build data-heavy websites and explain complex political trends through clear visual interfaces.

## Education

- **Central European University (CEU)** - Data and Society BA (ongoing)
- Relevant focus: applied statistics, social data analysis, and political behavior research

## Skills

- **Programming / data**: Python, pandas, SQL
- **Visualization**: Plotly, dashboard-focused storytelling
- **Web / delivery**: Quarto, static site workflows, Shiny (Python)
- **Domain**: polling aggregation, election-night estimation, public-facing analytics

## Selected Projects

- [Vox Populi: Választás 2026](vox-populi-valasztas-2026.qmd) - polling aggregation and mandate projection for the 2026 elections.
- [Vox Populi: US 2024](vox-populi-us2024.qmd) - US election polling aggregation interface.
- [Predictive election needle (444)](444-election-needle-2021.qmd) - real-time narrowing of probable outcomes during opposition primaries.
- [TestVot 2025](testvot-2025.qmd) - vote advice application for Romanian elections.

## Thesis Direction

Planned thesis topic: low-data election-night estimation during vote count processing for the 2026 election cycle, with potential public write-ups on the Vox Populi blog.

## Languages

- Hungarian (native)
- English (professional)

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/hidegmisi/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mihaly-hideg
